message:
fix(mux): improve tab overview and add keyboard navigation

Tab Overview:
- Match original full-screen layout (not a dialog)
- Show live terminal previews by moving DOM elements
- Pause all panels when overview opens to save server resources
- Resume panels when overview closes
- Add keyboard navigation (arrows to select, Enter to activate, Esc to close)
- Fix title bar height and sizing to match new tab button

Other fixes:
- Change "Connecting..." to "Loading..." in panel/app loading states
- Remove hardcoded "Terminal" from Window menu tab list (use 👻)
- Add Undo/Redo to Edit menu
- Add pauseAllPanels/resumeAllPanels methods to MuxClient
